command:
You are the SPEC-anchor /spec-core generation provider. Return only one JSON object. No markdown, no prose. The JSON object must include array field "sections". Each section item must include "source_section_id" and array field "related_sections". Each related_sections item must include "target_section_id", "relation_hint", "confidence", and "evidence_terms".
